scope: Passive-observer non-interference for iterative FixedPred and the opt-in joint-VJP reduced shortcut

observer_schema.capture_policy: first forward invocation per top-level layer
observer_schema.cleanup_rule: remove all observer handles and restore baseline hook ids
observer_schema.serialization_phase: after observed execution and hook cleanup

joint_vjp.reverse_policy: one joint state-and-parameter VJP per layer
joint_vjp.forward_graph_policy: detached graph island per top-level layer

claim_boundary: This gate concerns one paired stateless-SGD execution per arm in the pinned environment. It does not establish full-training non-interference, stateful-optimizer non-interference, runtime or memory overhead, or mechanistic validity of captured signals.
